claim: Tier 7.6e promotes the reduced-feature planning/subgoal-control mechanism into the bounded host-side software baseline line after the locked Tier 7.6d signal and full NEST compact regression both pass. It authorizes the v2.5 software baseline freeze.
caveat: Software promotion/regression evidence only; not public usefulness proof, not broad planning or reasoning, not hardware/native transfer, not autonomous on-chip planning, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
